blockingIssues.description: Generic method resolution still drops trait bounds declared on outer impl / trait-impl / trait generic lists because `check_fn_decl` rebuilds `param_bounds` from `fd.fn_generics` only, while enclosing contexts only extend `type_params`. Methods and default trait bodies using outer bounded parameters can therefore still reject valid trait calls.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify the expected relationship between the skill's test-first step and handoff reporting. Either require workers to add regression tests before implementation edits, or explicitly document when implementation-first debugging is acceptable and how `followedProcedure` should be reported when a deviation is recorded.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The review for `phase-8-fix-generic-trait-bound-method-resolution` found the worker edited `lib/typecheck.ml` before adding regression cases to `test/test_typecheck.ml`, while the handoff also marked `followedProcedure: true` and separately recorded a deviation from the test-first step.
